name: Copy Lattice Value
description: Copy a value from any readable path to any writable path. Key use: pin a venue op as a named shortcut — covia_copy from=v/ops/json/merge to=o/merge, then grid_run operation=o/merge. Also useful for snapshotting data or branching workspace values. Both read and write capability checks apply.

from.description: Source path. Any resolvable address: hex hash, /a/<hash>, /o/<name>, /v/<path>, DID URL, or workspace path (w/, g/, j/, etc.).

to.description: Destination path. Must be writable: w/, o/, n/, or t/.

copied.description: True if the value was successfully copied.
